channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Republican Rep. Tom Kean Jr. Plans June 30 Return After Long Absence from Capitol Hill
item.description: Rep. Tom Kean Jr. (R-N.J.) intends to end his months-long absence and return to Capitol Hill at the end of the month, a spokesperson said Thursday.

item.title: Vance warns Israel not to oppose Trump on Iran deal, calls US its only ally
item.description: Vice President Vance cautioned Israeli officials against criticizing the Iran deal, emphasizing the US is their sole ally.

item.title: Longevity medicine faces critical test with first human trial
item.description: The first human trial testing a drug's ability to reverse cellular aging marks a pivotal moment for the longevity field.

item.title: Iran's supreme leader says he approved deal and direct talks with US
item.description: Iran's Supreme Leader authorized direct negotiations with the US but emphasized this does not mean acceptance of all terms.
